patch.value: pm install exits 0 on error (CRITICAL agent-blocker)

Dogfood 2026-05-17: `pm install` (bare) and `pm install <bad-name>` print error text but exit with code 0, misleading agents into believing the install succeeded. Found in dogfood session 12.

Repro: `pm init && pm install nonexistent-name; echo exit=$?` -> prints Error: but exits 0.

Fix: install command must propagate non-zero exit codes on failure. Check src/cli/commands/extension.ts and src/cli/commands/package.ts install handlers.
Cannot reproduce: pm install nonexistent exits 3, pm install (bare) exits 2. Subagent shell-chaining artifact; verified manually in fresh /tmp.

author: codex-agent
